items.title: Tesla readies its autonomous Cybercab and Robotaxi cleaning service
items.body: A Texas permit just confirmed Tesla's cleaning robot is coming to service its Cybercab and Robotaxi fleet. The post Tesla readies its autonomous Cybercab and Robotaxi cleaning service appeared first on TESLARATI.
